response: If someone was declared “fit” despite a disability, the issue is likely either an improper VLK/medical assessment, missing medical documentation, or lack of appropriate rehabilitation/medical evidence. Concrete steps: (1) Request the full VLK decision and medical basis (all documents, diagnoses, exam results) and then file an appeal with the relevant commission/agency; (2) Collect and attach independent medical records and expert opinions (reports, imaging, functional assessments) from specialized providers, and use a patient support/advocacy channel where available. For hands-on help with navigating medical pathways and documents, contact [Rare Disease Hub Ukraine (by БФ ОХМАТДИТ – Здорове дитинство)](https://www.ohmatdytfund.org/) or the wounded-care documentation support from [Патронатна служба Янголи](https://www.azovangels.com/); also involve specialized treatment/rehab organizations if there are functional limits. Start by getting the decision packet in writing and submitting an appeal within the stated deadline.
